verses.text: Amaute tawh ka kikhen khit uh ciangin teembaw tawh paisuakin Kos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin Rods tuikulh ka tung uh a, tua lai panin a zing ciangin Patara khua ka tung uh hi
Tua lai panin Foenisia gamah a pai ding teembaw khat na om ahih manin tua teembaw tuangin ka pai uh hi

Saipras tuikulh a kigal muhna mun ka tun' uh ciangin tua tuikulh leitaw lampang kantanin Syria gam lam manawhin ka paisuak uh a, Taia khua ka tun' uh ciangin teembaw in a van puakte suah ahih manin teembaw tung pan ka tuakkhia uh hi
Tua khua-ah ka kan uh leh thu um mi pawlkhat na om uh a, amaute kiangah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi. Jerusalem khua-ah Paul a pailohna dingin Kha Siangtho' lamlahna tawh amaute in a gen uh hi

Amaute kiang panin ka ciahkhiat ding uh hun hong tun' ciangin ka dingkhia uh a, a zite a tate uh tawh a vekpi-un khuanawl ciang hong zui uh hi. Tuipi gei ka tun' uh ciangin khukdin'in thu ka ngen uh hi
Tua ciangin khatlekhat mangpha kikhakin teembaw tungah ka tuang uh a, amaute zong a inn uhah a ciah uh hi
Taia khua panin teembaw tawh pai-in Tolemais khua ka tung uh a, tua lai-ah thu um mite kiangah sun khat kulhin amaute tawh ka kiho uh hi
A zing ciangin ding leuleu-in Sisaria khua ka tung uh a, Pasian thu a hilh Filip' inn-ah tungin tua lai-ah ka taam uh hi. Tuapa pen Jerusalem khua-a a kiteel mi sagihte sungah a kihel ahi hi
Amah in Pasian thu a hilh tanu-ngak li nei hi
Tua lai-ah tawlkhat ka taam khit uh ciangin Judea gam panin Agabas min nei kamsang khat hong tung hi

Kote' kiangah amah hong pai-in Paul' kawnggak hong laksak a, tua kawnggak tawh ama khut leh a khete a gakcip khit ciangin, “Kha Siangtho in, ‘Jerusalem khuasungah hih bangin Jew mite in hih kawnggak neipa hencip ding a, Gentail mite' khutsungah pia ding hi,’ ci hi,” a hong ci hi
Hih thu ka zak uh ciangin kote leh tua lai-a om thu um mite in Jerusalem-ah Paul a pailohna dingin ka thum uh hi

Ahi zongin Paul in, “Bang hangin hih bangin kapin ka lungsim a tapkhapna dingin gamta na hi uh hiam? Jerusalem khua-ah khihcipna a thuakding bek hiloin, Topa Jesuh hangin a si ding ciangdongin a kithawisa ka hi hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi
Thu ka genpihpih uh hangin hong mang zolo ahih manin, ka cihna ding uh thei nawnloin, “Topa' deihna bangbang hi ta hen,” ci-in ka omta uh hi
Tua lai-ah tawlkhat ka taam khit uh ciangin ka vante uh kithawi-in Jerusalem khua a zuan dingin ka din'khiat uh ciangin

Sisaria khua panin thu um mi pawlkhat in zong hong zui uh a, ka tun'na ding uh Mnason' inn-ah hong paipih uh hi. Mnason pen Saipras tuikulh gammi hi a, sawt peka kipanin thu um mi a na hi khinsa ahi hi.
Jerusalem khua ka tun' uh ciangin thu um mite in lungdam mahmahin a hong hopih uh hi
A zing ciangin James kiangah Paul tawh ka hawh uh a, tua lai-ah pawlpi upa khempeuh a na om uh hi
Paul in amaute hopih a, Pasian in amah Paul tung tawnin Gentail mite lakah na a sepna khempeuh a banbanin a cingtakin a gen hi

Ama thugen teng a zakkhit uh ciangin a vekpi-un Pasian a phat uh hi. Tua ciangin Paul kiangah, “Sanggam aw, hih lai-ah na theih ding thu khat om hi. Hih lai-ah thu um Jew mi tampi tak om a, amaute in thukham nakzuih mahmah uh hi

Gentail mite laka om Jew mi khempeuh tungah na thuhilhna, amaute in Moses thukham zuiloin, Jew ngeina zui nawnloin, a tate uh zong vun a atlohna dingun na thugente khempeuh, hih lai-a om Jew mite tungah kigen hi
Hih lai nong tun'khitna thu amaute in pelloin zakhin ding uh ahih manin bangcih ding ihi hiam
Tua ahih manin kong gen bangun gamta in. Pasian tungah thuciamna a bawl khinsa mihing li om hi

Tua mite tawh va kipawl in la, a kisian'suahna uhah nang zong va kihelin, a sum beiteng khempeuh nangmah in sik in. A kisian'suah khit uh ciangin amaute in a sam uh met thei ta ding uh hi. Hih bangin gamta lecin a beisa huna nangma thu a kigente khempeuh a man khat zong omloin, nangmahmah zong Moses Thukham a zui na hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi

Thu um Gentail mite tawh kisai-in ahih leh, amaute in milim biakna an khat peuhpeuh, sasi, leh a si kiluangkhiasak loin gawlmek-a kigo sate a nek lohna ding uh, leh numei tawh khialhna panin a kikepna ding uh hoih hi, ci-in thu khensatin lai ka khak khinzo uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Paul, a zing ciangin tua mi lite tawh va pai khawmin kisian'suahna a va bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah amah va pai a, a kisian'suah hun sung uh a hun sawt ding tan, tua mi lite-a' dingin biakna a kipiak ding ni a va zasak hi.
Tua ni sagih hunsung a bei dektak ciangin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawlkhat in, biakinn sungah Paul a omna a mu uh hi. Amaute in mihonte sosuahin Paul man uh a

“Israel mite aw, hong huh un. Mun khempeuhah thu hilh kawikawi-in, Moses Thukham, leh hih biakinn langpangin mi khempeuh kiangah Israel mite a hong gensiapa ahi hi. Tu-in Gentail mite nangawn biakinn sungah hong paipihin hih biakinn siangtho a ninsak hi,” ci-in a awng uh hi
(Hih bang a cih theihna uh pen khua sungah Paul leh Efesa khuami Trofimas a kikhawl mu uh a, Paul in biakinn sungah tua mipa a lutpih a sa kha uh ahi hi
Tua ciangin hih thu in khuasung khempeuh hong zel a, mite hong tai-in hong kikhawmin Paul man uh a, biakinn pualamah kaikhia-in, biakinn kongkhakte a khakpah uh hi
Mihonte in Paul that dingin a kithawi laitakun Jerusalem khuasung buai mahmah hi, ci-in Rom galkapmangpa kiangah thu na kipuak hi
Galkapmangpa in zong thakhatin galkapbute leh galkapte samin mihonte lak a va kiden'na uh hi. Mihonte in galkapte tawh hong pailam a muh uh ciangin Paul a sat nawn kei uh hi
Paul kiangah galkapmangpa hong pai-in man a, sikkhau nih tawh Paul a khihna dingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih mipa kua hi a, bang gamta ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin

mihonte sung panin pawlkhat in thu khat genin, pawlkhat in adang khat a gen hi. Mihon kibuai lua a, bang teng taktak hiam, cih theikhia zolo ahih manin galkap inn-ah a paipihna dingun a mite thu a pia hi
Galkap huangsung lutna kahlei a tun' uh ciangin mihonte in nehcip lua uh ahih manin galkapte in Paul laamto-in a paipih uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonte in hong nungzuihin, “Amah that un,” ci-in a awng uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in A Suahtakna ding Hanciamin Thu Gen

verses.text: Amaute in galkap huangsungah Paul a lutpih dektak laitakun Paul in galkapmangpa kiangah, “Nang tung thu tawmkhat kong genthei ding hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin galkapmangpa in, “Grik pau siam hilo na hi hiam
Tua ahih manin tu-ma lamin kumpi lehdo dingin mihing tul li tawh gamsungah a pai Egypt mipa hi buang kei ni teh maw?” a ci hi
Paul in, “Kei pen Silisia gam Tarsas khua-a suak Jew mi ka hi a, khua thupi sungah a teng mi ka hi hi. Nong hehpihna-in hih mihonte tungah thu hong gensak in,” a ci hi
Galkapmangpa in zong thu a gending phal ahih manin kahlei cial tungah Paul ding a, mite a gamdaihna dingin a khut a van hi. Mite a gamdaih khit ciangin Paul in Hebru pau-in mite tungah thu gen a,
